page_metadata.biotools__summary: Tool that combines different protein signature recognition methods into one resource. It is a reimplementation of the traditional InterProScan 4.x series and adds features such as pathway annotations and signal peptide and transmembrane prediction using Phobius.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Tool that combines different protein signature recognition methods into one resource. It is a reimplementation of the traditional InterProScan 4.x series and adds features such as pathway annotations and signal peptide and transmembrane prediction using Phobius.
